name: Client 0222-115
history: Recurrent dreams during graduate school about being unprepared for a thesis defense. Father described as having high expectations.
intermediate_belief: I must be prepared and meet expectations to be successful.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not prepared, I will fail and be seen as incompetent.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of situations where failure is possible; striving for independence and self-reliance.
situation: Receiving criticism during a work performance review.
auto_thought: I can't believe I didn't see this coming. I'm not good enough.
behavior: Attempts to overcompensate by working harder and seeking to prove competence.
